questions.q: A coach wants to make a team with a mix of fast and slow runners. What type of team is this?
What is the main role of a leader in a group?
questions.answer: A leader guides, motivates, and facilitates the group towards achieving its goals.

questions.q: A team is practicing yoga to improve flexibility and balance. What type of physical activity is this?
Explain the importance of goal-setting in a team.
questions.answer: Goal-setting helps to clarify the team's objectives, focuses effort, and motivates team members to work towards achieving a common objective.

questions.q: Name two characteristics of an effective leader.
A coach is using positive reinforcement to motivate a team. What is the likely outcome?
Explain the benefits of team-building activities.
questions.answer: Team-building activities promote teamwork, communication, and trust among team members, which leads to improved performance and morale.

questions.q: A team is working on a project to improve their public speaking skills. What type of physical activity is this?
What is the main difference between a leader and a manager?
questions.answer: A leader inspires and motivates, while a manager plans and organizes.

questions.q: Explain the importance of communication in team sports.
questions.answer: Communication is essential in team sports as it enables team members to coordinate their actions, execute strategies, and respond to changing situations.
